description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a clean, minimalist design, upholstered in a light fabric. The sofa features broad, straight armrests and a deep seat, providing ample space for multiple people. It is adorned with six loose cushions: four in a matching light color and two in a contrasting dark shade, arranged symmetrically for both comfort and visual interest. The backrest is straight and runs the full width of the sofa, supporting the cushions. The base and sides are solid and boxy, with no visible legs, giving the sofa a grounded, monolithic appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A modern, boxy sofa with light upholstery, straight armrests, and six loose cushions in contrasting colors. The design is minimalist and solid, with no visible legs and a smooth fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, straight backrest, broad armrests, and all six cushions arranged symmetrically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back panel and the tops of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the armrest and cushion profile from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six loose cushions: four light-colored and two dark-colored, symmetrically arranged with three back cushions and three seat cushions, all uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at seat height, rectangular profile, fully upholstered with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears solid and boxy, suggesting a recessed or hidden leg design.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, full-width backrest with loose cushions, medium height, continuous and unsegmented, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
